title: Mid-Level Business Development Manager at Aliens Group

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Business Development Manager at Aliens Group
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aliens Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Business Development Manager to strengthen our Ludhiana-based team.

About Aliens Group:
Aliens Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aliens Group!
